selections.name: Doom Loop
selections.reason: Boasts the highest base speed figure (84) in this field and narrowly missed last time out. Projects a favorable stalking trip.

selections.name: Midnight Stroller
selections.reason: Consistent early/presser type who can capitalize if the pace scenario falls apart. Solid class rating.

selections.name: The Groom's Jul
selections.reason: Possesses enough tactical speed to stay involved early. Forgiving his last trip puts him right in the mix.

selections.name: Mark Of Greatness
selections.reason: Late runner who could benefit from the turf final fraction bonus if the front-runners duel.

danger_horse.name: Ocata
danger_horse.reason: Lightly raced with room to improve; outside draw keeps him out of trouble.

selections.name: Beachwalker
selections.reason: Top speed figure (94) in the main body of the field. Class relief makes him a formidable threat.

selections.name: Versatile
selections.reason: Coming off a sharp win and draws the rail. Early speed metrics suggest he can control the tempo.

selections.name: Bohemian Style
selections.reason: Strong recent speed figures (93) and fits the class level perfectly. Excellent value at 15/1 morning line.

selections.name: Mean Tweets
selections.reason: Consistent performer with a 90 speed figure. Gets weight relief and should be closing late.

danger_horse.name: Cavendish
danger_horse.reason: Capable of popping a big figure on his best day; dangerous if the pace is honest.

selections.name: Intel Agent
selections.reason: Massive speed figure advantage (104) over this group. Class dropper who should dominate this maiden claiming field.

selections.name: Flowerbomb
selections.reason: Second highest speed figure (96) and has faced tougher maiden special weight company.

selections.name: Have A Happy
selections.reason: Outside draw is tricky, but possesses a solid 90 speed figure that puts her in the exotic mix.

selections.name: Echo Vision
selections.reason: Shows enough early foot to be a factor at a price. Weight allowance helps.

selections.name: Yes I Am Free
selections.reason: Incredible class disparity here. Boasts a 122 speed figure and is dropping significantly in class. The clear one to beat.

selections.name: Unworkable
selections.reason: Strong 108 speed figure and consistent form. Will be picking up the pieces if the top pick falters.

selections.name: You Bet A Fortune
selections.reason: Excellent inside draw with a 107 speed figure. Tactical speed makes him a major player.

selections.name: Dropkick Murphy
selections.reason: Presents massive value at 20/1 with a 106 speed figure. A must-use in exotics.

danger_horse.name: Cybertime
danger_horse.reason: Classy runner who can fire fresh off the bench.

selections.name: Osprey
selections.reason: Top speed figure (96) in a wide-open claiming event. Mid-pack draw allows for a perfect stalking trip.

selections.name: Take Charge Gent
selections.reason: Outside post is a slight negative, but his 95 speed figure and class metrics demand respect.

selections.name: Fat Daddy
selections.reason: Veteran runner with a 93 speed figure. Knows how to win at this level and distance.

selections.name: Grey Streak
selections.reason: Solid 92 speed figure and offers value at 8/1. Can hit the board with the right pace setup.

danger_horse.name: Scratchoff
danger_horse.reason: Inside draw and consistent mid-80s figures make him a threat to wire the field.

selections.name: Doomed
selections.reason: Standout speed figure of 101. Drops in class and draws perfectly inside to control the race.

selections.name: Game Maker (ire)
selections.reason: Second best speed figure (91) and should get a great trip tracking the favorite.

selections.name: Frozen Four
selections.reason: Capable of mid-80s to low-90s figures. Good value underneath in exotics.

selections.name: High Spark
selections.reason: Rail draw and an 89 speed figure make him a live longshot at 15/1.

danger_horse.name: Shore Time
danger_horse.reason: Consistent runner who can capitalize if the top pick faces early pressure.

selections.name: A Ok
selections.reason: Dominant 90 speed figure and draws the rail. Looks very tough to beat in this spot.

selections.name: Tup's To Take
selections.reason: Solid 79 speed figure and projects a clean stalking trip from post 3.

selections.name: Prime Shopping
selections.reason: Tied for second-best speed figure (79) and offers massive value at 20/1.

selections.name: Nocloudsinmystones
selections.reason: Consistent 78 speed figure. Will be part of the early pace scenario.

danger_horse.name: Union Branch
danger_horse.reason: Outside draw is tough, but has the back class to factor if the pace melts down.

selections.name: Post Facto
selections.reason: Top speed figure (99) and draws the rail for the route distance. Huge value at 20/1 morning line.

selections.name: Thought
selections.reason: Strong 98 speed figure and consistent form. A major contender for the top spot.

selections.name: Grimes
selections.reason: Presents a 97 speed figure and offers great exotic value at 15/1.

selections.name: El Ondeado
selections.reason: Solid 95 speed figure and fits well at this starter optional claiming level.

danger_horse.name: Buckin' Dreamer
danger_horse.reason: Consistent 94 speed figure and draws well inside.
